name: The Boiled One Phenomenon
description: The Boiled Phenomenon also known as PHEN-228 appears in the Broadcast-813, a 2003 incident in which an episode of a nature program was interrupted by an anomalous broadcast, with an entity with a red "melted" face speaking to the viewers. Once seen on the TV it will implant a permanent memory of the anomaly’s face into your mind, Once the victim has seen the broadcast will only be able to see hallucinations, have visions, and dreams of the depicting face after viewing the footage. Those of them interviewed said that they continued to see the entity in their vicinity and heard trumpets and screaming "of many voices.". It can stretch any part of its body for as it’s an entity that can do anything with its body such as twisting it, turning it, and stretching its body parts.
creator: out4mercy
